name: Launch Pad Golf Club
about: Launch Pad Golf Club is a golf simulator and training facility that operates on a 24/7 schedule, offering all-weather play and practice in an air-conditioned environment. The venue is powered by TrackMan 4 technology, providing a private, scheduled space for solo sessions, group play, and family activities. It features a dedicated putting green and a 'heckle bar' for social observation, alongside a membership model designed for flexible, on-demand access.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA-level TrackMan technology for accurate shot analysis
Private, climate-controlled environment for focused practice
Social features like the 'heckle bar' and group play options

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB facility; several food and beverage options available nearby, including delivery
BYOB facility; members can bring their own alcohol

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT) for club and ball-flight measurement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs for play and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Launch Pad is a BYOB facility, allowing members to bring their own food and beverages. There are also nearby restaurants and delivery options available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the simulator software and group size, but it typically takes 2-3 hours for a full round.

faq.question: Is Launch Pad Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers activities suitable for children, including family-fun games and a dedicated putting green.
